weather_report:
As the evening settles softly over Boston, a gentle wrapping of clouds drifts lazily through the sky, creating an atmosphere of serene anticipation. The air carries a mellow coolness, with temperatures dipping into the low fifties, beckoning those who venture outside to don a light jacket or perhaps a cozy sweater. A soft breeze brushes past, whispering of the calm yet invigorating night ahead. 

Tomorrow promises a bounteous day, as the sun makes its ascent amidst a canopy of clouds, revealing patches of blue and allowing warmth to cascade down towards the earth. With highs anticipated around seventy-one, the day will call for uncomplicated pleasures—perhaps a leisurely stroll along the Charles River or a visit to one of Boston’s charming parks, where you can immerse yourself in the gentle rustle of leaves. A hint of rain lingers in the air, but it should be a mere fleeting thought, unnecessary to disrupt the joy of the day. As the sun drapes its golden rays across the city, it invites you to unwind and savor the simple moments of a late spring day.
